overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player traverses an elevated covered walkway with red lanterns, crosses an open pedestrian bridge, descends to a ground-level plaza under an overpass, and walks along a neon-lit commercial street with various NPCs.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated walkway, passing under red paper lanterns

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated covered walkway in a futuristic city. Red paper lanterns hang overhead while a teal glass tower rises on the right. The path is partially covered with neon strip lights visible on the left wall. A man in an orange jacket leans on the railing looking out at the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian bridge with white railings descending to plaza

events.description: exiting covered walkway onto open pedestrian bridge with full sky visibility
beginning descent down sloped ramp of pedestrian bridge

agents.ego_description: walking across open bridge and descending ramp toward ground level

entered.detail: sloped concrete walkway with white metal railings on both sides
white painted safety railings along bridge edge
white painted safety railings along bridge edge
multi-story red building with balconies and neon signage
tall palm tree at end of bridge ramp

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway onto an open pedestrian bridge with white railings. The camera descends a sloped ramp toward ground level, with a red mixed-use building on the left and a tall palm tree ahead. The green glass tower now appears in the distance as the descent continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza under highway overpass with artificial turf

massive concrete highway overpass creating covered area
wide concrete stairs leading down to lower plaza level
sections of bright green artificial grass between concrete paths
large illuminated advertising screens under the overpass

segments.scene_description: Reaching ground level into a concrete plaza with patches of artificial turf. The area is partially covered by a massive highway overpass with large digital billboards visible underneath. The camera descends stairs and walks through this transitional space where several pedestrians are scattered about.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon storefronts and building entrances

events.description: exiting covered plaza onto open commercial street with storefronts
approaching building entrance with NPCs standing near doorway

agents.ego_description: walking along commercial sidewalk passing various pedestrians and storefronts

notable_agents.action: woman with blue hair standing near building entrance door
man in black mask and suit standing with hands on hips near entrance

entered.detail: paved pedestrian walkway lined with commercial buildings
building with green walls and red structural columns featuring neon trim
traditional Japanese stone lanterns flanking building entrance
wooden door with metal frame leading into commercial establishment
scattered cardboard boxes and trash on sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial street lined with buildings featuring neon signage. The camera passes a green and red building facade with traditional stone lanterns flanking the entrance. Various pedestrians walk along the sidewalk which has scattered cardboard debris. A woman with distinctive blue hair and a man in a black mask stand near a doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an elevated, sheltered walkway down into the neon-lit bustle of a ground-level commercial district. It begins under a canopy of red paper lanterns and neon strips, passing a man in an orange jacket beside a towering teal glass structure. As the camera exits the cover, it moves across an open pedestrian bridge and descends a sloped ramp past a red building and a tall palm tree. The scene then shifts into a concrete plaza beneath a massive highway overpass filled with digital billboards, where the camera navigates stairs and artificial turf among scattered pedestrians. Finally, the path opens onto a commercial street lined with vibrant neon signage and stone lanterns, passing a woman with blue hair and a masked man amidst the urban debris of the sidewalk.
